# Extended Inventory Preparation Filters

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

Includes more options for making an inventory out of:

- Products filtered by a domain.
- Products of a category.
- Multiple lots

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/stock-logistics-warehouse/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/stock-logistics-warehouse/issues/new?body=module:%20stock_inventory_preparation_filter%0Aversion:%2016.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.
